In April, '17,

@jsomers

of

@NewYorker

reached out & said he wanted to do a small profile of me & my longtime colleague Sanjay Ghemawat, watch us work for a few hours, maybe dinner, etc. It came out today. I think it captures our working style really well.

[The Friendship That Made Google Huge](https://t.co/cRSMiFfwAP)

[From newyorker.com](https://t.co/cRSMiFfwAP)
